case_title: BERMUDEZ, PETER (BERMUDEZ CONSTRUCTION) VS DINTCHO, STANLEY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BERMUDEZ, PETER (BERMUDEZ CONSTRUCTION) AS TO DEFENDANT DINTCHO, STANLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-17-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
